pkgmetadata.longdescription: FLEX[[Build Status](httpsbadgen.nettravispipermerriamflex)](httpstravis-ci.orgpipermerriamflex)[[Documentation Status](httpsreadthedocs.orgprojectsflex-swaggerbadgeversionlatest)](httpsreadthedocs.orgprojectsflex-swaggerbadgelatest)[[PyPi version](httpsbadgen.netpypivflex)](httpspypi.orgprojectflex)[[PyPi downloads](httpsimg.shields.iopypidmflex.svg)](httpspypi.python.orgpypiflex) Validation tooling for [Swagger 2.0](httpsgithub.comwordnikswagger-specblobmasterversions2.0.md) specifications.[Documentation on ReadTheDocs](httpflex-swagger.readthedocs.orgenlatest) Features Validate swagger schemas. JSON Schema Validation Validation of requestresponse objects against schema. Command Line interface. CLI Name ChangeStarting in version 5.0.0 the CLI interface has been changed to swagger-flexdue to a collision with the Apache Flex project.
